item.title: Edwards to pay $10M FTC penalty over JC Medical deal
item.description: The U.S. Federal Trade Commission (FTC) today said it secured $12 million in a settlement with Edwards (NYSE:EW) and Genesis MedTech.

item.title: Edwards will pay $10M to settle FTC charges of skirting antitrust review
item.description: The artificial heart valve maker will settle allegations it deliberately structured its deal to acquire JC Medical to sidestep a Hart-Scott-Rodino review.

item.title: FTC Imposes Record $12 Million in Fines for HSR Avoidance Scheme
item.description: The Federal Trade Commission has levied an unprecedented $12 million in fines against two merger parties for allegedly structuring their ...

item.title: A Cautionary Tale: FTC Obtains $12M Settlement For Hart-Scott-Rodino Act Failure to File Violation
item.description: The FTC imposed $12 million in penalties against Edwards Lifesciences Corp. and Genesis MedTech Group Ltd. for closing a July 2024 acquisition ...

item.title: Hiltzik: As Trump torpedoes antitrust enforcement, the states fill the vacuum
item.description: The states' lawsuit to block the Paramount-Warner Bros. merger shows they're willing to step in when the federal government abandons antitrust cases.

item.title: The FTC is escalating its antitrust probe into Microsoft's cloud and AI grip
item.description: Who here is old enough to remember back in the late 1990s when Microsoft got in trouble with regulators when it bundled its Internet Explorer browser with Windows? Since then, Microsoft has largely ...

item.title: John Deere, FTC reach proposed deal to end right-to-repair antitrust suit
item.description: John Deere has agreed to make the same repair tools used by its dealers available to farmers and independent repair shops “on fair and reasonable terms, under a proposed settlement filed Wednesday ...

item.title: FTC says it will appeal Meta antitrust decision
item.description: Add Yahoo as a preferred source to see more of our stories on Google. FILE -A Meta logo is shown on a video screen at LlamaCon 2025, an AI developer conference, in Menlo Park, Calif., April 29, 2025. ...

item.title: John Deere Repair Software Opened by FTC: Antitrust Template for Cars and Phones
item.description: John Deere FTC settlement requires the company to open its diagnostic repair software to farmers and independent mechanics for 10 years — the first federal antitrust consent decree to apply Sherman ...

item.title: DOJ, FTC Signal Heightened Antitrust Scrutiny of Accreditation Bodies
item.description: Two recent actions by federal antitrust regulators suggest heightened scrutiny of professional and educational accreditors for anticompetitive practices, antitrust lawyers said. The U.S. Department of ...

item.title: The FTC isn't giving up on its antitrust case against Meta
item.description: The Federal Trade Commission lost its antitrust case against Meta last year, but the regulator hasn't given up on its attempts to punish the social media company for its acquisitions of WhatsApp and ...
